UpdateSourceArgs: -lc 'set -e; cd "{{$FullBaseDir}}"; TMP=$(mktemp -d); fetch(){ if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL -o "$2" "$1"; elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then wget -q -O "$2" "$1"; else python3 -c "import urllib.request,sys; urllib.request.urlretrieve(sys.argv[1], sys.argv[2])" "$1" "$2"; fi; }; fetch https://thunderstore.io/package/download/xiaoye97/BepInEx/5.4.17/ "$TMP/bepinex.zip"; unzip -oq "$TMP/bepinex.zip" -d "$TMP/bepinex"; if [ -d "$TMP/bepinex/BepInExPack" ]; then cp -rf "$TMP/bepinex/BepInExPack/." .; else cp -rf "$TMP/bepinex/." .; fi; rm -rf "$TMP"'

-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Set-Location '{{%FullBaseDir%}}'; $tmp=New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force ([IO.Path]::Combine([IO.Path]::GetTempPath(),'dspbepinex')); Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://thunderstore.io/package/download/xiaoye97/BepInEx/5.4.17/' -OutFile ($tmp.FullName + '\bepinex.zip'); Expand-Archive -Force ($tmp.FullName + '\bepinex.zip') ($tmp.FullName + '\bepinex'); $src=$tmp.FullName + '\bepinex\BepInExPack'; if (!(Test-Path $src)) { $src=$tmp.FullName + '\bepinex' }; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ($src + '\*') .; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp.FullName"

-lc 'set -e; cd "{{$FullBaseDir}}"; mkdir -p BepInEx/plugins; TMP=$(mktemp -d); fetch(){ if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL -o "$2" "$1"; elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then wget -q -O "$2" "$1"; else python3 -c "import urllib.request,sys; urllib.request.urlretrieve(sys.argv[1], sys.argv[2])" "$1" "$2"; fi; }; fetch https://thunderstore.io/package/download/nebula/NebulaMultiplayerModApi/2.1.0/ "$TMP/api.zip"; unzip -oq "$TMP/api.zip" -d "$TMP/api"; cp -rf "$TMP/api/plugins/." BepInEx/plugins/; rm -rf "$TMP"'

-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Set-Location '{{%FullBaseDir%}}'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'BepInEx\plugins' | Out-Null; $tmp=New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force ([IO.Path]::Combine([IO.Path]::GetTempPath(),'dspnebapi')); Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://thunderstore.io/package/download/nebula/NebulaMultiplayerModApi/2.1.0/' -OutFile ($tmp.FullName + '\api.zip'); Expand-Archive -Force ($tmp.FullName + '\api.zip') ($tmp.FullName + '\api'); Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ($tmp.FullName + '\api\plugins\*') 'BepInEx\plugins\'; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp.FullName"

-lc 'set -e; cd "{{$FullBaseDir}}"; mkdir -p BepInEx/plugins; TMP=$(mktemp -d); fetch(){ if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL -o "$2" "$1"; elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then wget -q -O "$2" "$1"; else python3 -c "import urllib.request,sys; urllib.request.urlretrieve(sys.argv[1], sys.argv[2])" "$1" "$2"; fi; }; fetch https://thunderstore.io/package/download/nebula/NebulaMultiplayerMod/0.9.16/ "$TMP/nebula.zip"; unzip -oq "$TMP/nebula.zip" -d "$TMP/nebula"; cp -rf "$TMP/nebula/plugins/." BepInEx/plugins/; rm -rf "$TMP"'

-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Set-Location '{{%FullBaseDir%}}'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'BepInEx\plugins' | Out-Null; $tmp=New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force ([IO.Path]::Combine([IO.Path]::GetTempPath(),'dspnebula')); Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://thunderstore.io/package/download/nebula/NebulaMultiplayerMod/0.9.16/' -OutFile ($tmp.FullName + '
ebula.zip'); Expand-Archive -Force ($tmp.FullName + '
ebula.zip') ($tmp.FullName + '
ebula'); Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ($tmp.FullName + '
ebula\plugins\*') 'BepInEx\plugins'; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp.FullName"

-lc 'set -e; export WINEPREFIX="{{$FullRootDir}}.wine"; export WINEARCH=win64; export WINEDEBUG=-all; command -v wineboot >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "wineboot not found. Use AMP wine-stable container or install Wine."; exit 127; }; wineboot --init'
